judge.reason: The primary purpose of __tipc_shutdown is to perform socket shutdown logic—waiting for conditions, pushing delayed messages, purging queues, sending FIN messages, and handling different socket states. The only refcount-related call is kfree_skb for freeing skbs, which is incidental cleanup, not the main focus. There is no get/put/set on any reference-counted object central to the function's purpose.
